title: ‘Dignity, Safety Non-Negotiable’: CM Yogi Adityanath Issues Tough Directives After Noida Violence
description: Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath ordered authorities to identify and act against elements trying to incite unrest in the name of workers. Directing officials to increase vigilance, he said they must stay alert against any attempts to revive extremist or Naxalite-linked activities under the guise of labour protests.
